headline: Earnings Preview: Eversource Energy (ES) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Eversource (ES) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: PG&E (PCG) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
summary: PG&E (PCG) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +8.11% and -6.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on WEC Energy Group, Lowers Price Target to $117
summary: Keybanc  analyst Sophie Karp   maintains WEC Energy Group (NYSE:WEC) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $126 to $117.
